steps.t: Harlanc is located south of Bâr Húrin. You should collect sashes off the Haradrim you defeat in Harlanc.
Harlanc is located south of Bâr Húrin. You should collect sashes off the Haradrim you defeat in Harlanc.
Thurindol can be found in the keep at Bâr Húrin. You should show Thurindol the sashes you have collected from the Haradrim.
